plugins.cameraPermission: FART uses the camera to snap photos of your script pages.
plugins.photosPermission: FART uses your photos to import script pages.

plugins.cameraPermission: FART uses the camera to record your self-tape auditions.
plugins.microphonePermission: FART uses the microphone to record your voice in self-tapes.

plugins.savePhotosPermission: FART saves your self-tape videos to your photo library.

plugins.microphonePermission: FART uses the microphone to hear voice commands like 'FART start'.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: FART uses speech recognition for hands-free recording commands.
